├── 📂 Models/

│   │    └── wan2.1_14B_SCAIL_2_fp16.safetensors

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: single young Japanese woman wearing an elegant dark navy kimono with intricate gold and green floral embroidery, short dark bob haircut, replacing the original woman, preserving the exact pose, body motion, timing, camera framing and background of the driving video, consistent identity, consistent face, consistent hairstyle, consistent kimono design and floral pattern, stable body proportions, natural hands and fingers, graceful energetic dancing motion, realistic skin texture, realistic cinematic video, high detail, only one person
